[196:43]shallow, especially around Iran's coastline. So they extract the oil and refine the oil near the coast,

[196:51]but they can't actually load the oil onto a tanker, onto a super tanker, because the Persian

[196:58]Gulf is too shallow on the coast. So a super tanker won't be able to actually dock there. So what they
